message:
fix(freeze): allow self-recursive functions with get_var_ref0

The hasKillerOpcodes check was blocking self-recursive functions like fib()
because they use get_var_ref0 to reference themselves. This fix allows
get_var_ref0 specifically for functions marked as self-recursive.

Also fixes:
- WASM32 JSValue compatibility in jsvalueToAddr() and nativeGetParent()
- CV/JSValue type mismatches in various opcodes (lnot, typeof, throw, etc.)
- Eval branch quota issues in toJSValue()/fromJSValue()
- Removed static from native_registry for Zig access

Performance restored:
- fib(45): EdgeBox 2878ms vs Bun 5236ms (1.82x faster)
